hero.headline_html:

hero.subheadline: Your professional multilingual landing page — built to attract more inquiries, more clients and more opportunities on autopilot.

problem.headline: You're Losing Clients Before You Ever Make Contact.
problem.card1_desc: Your social media profile is not enough. Clients look for professionals with a dedicated, trustworthy online presence.
problem.card2_desc: Without a clear conversion strategy, potential clients browse your profile and vanish without leaving any contact.
problem.card3_desc: You spend hours posting on Instagram and Facebook, but have no way to turn those visitors into clients.

solution.headline: Your Digital Office Working 24/7
solution.subheadline: LUMI LANDING transforms your online presence into a complete client generation system.
solution.feat1_title: Professional Page for Real Estate Agents
solution.feat1_desc: A stunning, conversion-optimized landing page designed exclusively for your real estate business.
solution.feat2_desc: Intelligent forms that qualify your contacts before they even reach you: buyer, seller, investor or referral.
solution.feat_contact_desc: Let your clients reach you the way they prefer — phone, text, email or WhatsApp.
solution.feat3_desc: One click connects potential clients directly to your WhatsApp with a personalized message.
solution.feat4_desc: Your page automatically serves clients in English, Spanish or Portuguese, with no extra work on your end.
solution.feat5_desc: Offer free guides to capture contact information from visitors who are not yet ready to reach out.

templates.headline: Choose Your Professional Page
templates.subheadline: Five premium designs built to elevate your brand and present your business the way it deserves.
templates.t1_desc: Elegant and sophisticated for high-end property specialists.
templates.t2_desc: Clean and contemporary for the modern real estate professional.
templates.t3_desc: Community-focused design for local market experts.
templates.t4_desc: Data-driven layout for investment property professionals.
templates.t5_desc: Warm and approachable for first-time buyer specialists.

howItWorks.headline: Your Landing Page Live in 3 Steps
howItWorks.step1_desc: Select the design that best reflects your image and your brand.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Complete our guided onboarding in minutes. No technical knowledge required.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Your page goes live and starts attracting contacts, inquiries and WhatsApp messages.

leadCapture.headline: Every Visitor Can Become a Future Client
leadCapture.subheadline: Multiple capture mechanisms ensure no opportunity is lost.
leadCapture.card1_desc: Capture buyers early in their search process.
leadCapture.card2_desc: Connect with homeowners thinking about selling.
leadCapture.card3_desc: Stay top of mind with market updates.
leadCapture.card4_desc: Offer value in exchange for contact information.

leadmagnet.subheadline: Offer a free guide and capture the contact of potential clients who are not yet ready to reach out.

multilingual.headline: Connect With More Clients in Their Preferred Language.
multilingual.subheadline: Your clients speak English, Portuguese and Spanish. Your page speaks all three — with one click.
multilingual.lang1_desc: Reach the full US market with fluent, professional English content.
multilingual.lang2_desc: Connect with the growing Brazilian community in the United States.
multilingual.lang3_desc: Reach the largest minority group of home buyers in the US.

whatsapp.subheadline: A floating WhatsApp button on your page lets clients reach you instantly. The fastest path from interest to a real conversation.

crm.flow_desc: Built for your real estate business. Be the first to know.

pricing.headline: Full Access on Both Plans.
pricing.subheadline: No setup fees. No hidden costs. Cancel anytime.
pricing.desc_monthly: Monthly billing with full access to LUMI LANDING.
pricing.desc_annual: Save by choosing the annual plan with full access to LUMI LANDING.
pricing.feat1: Professional landing page for real estate agents

checkout.faq1_a: You are automatically redirected to the LUMI LANDING briefing form. Our team creates your page within 3 business days.
checkout.faq2_q: Can I cancel at any time?
checkout.faq3_a: 100%. The entire process is handled by Stripe, the most trusted payment platform on the market.
checkout.faq4_q: What is the difference between plans?
checkout.faq4_a: Both plans include all LUMI LANDING features. The annual plan offers significant savings for those who want long-term access.

faq.headline: Common Questions
faq.q1: Do I need technical knowledge to set up my page?
faq.a1: No. Our onboarding wizard guides you through every step. If you can fill out a form, you can launch your LUMI LANDING page.
faq.q2: Can I use my own domain?
faq.a2: Yes. You can connect your own domain (e.g. sarahjohnson.com) to your LUMI LANDING page while your subscription is active.
faq.a3: Yes. LUMI LANDING connects to any CRM via webhook, as well as Zapier, Make, Google Sheets and direct email.
faq.q4: Does it work in multiple languages?
faq.a4: Yes. Every LUMI LANDING page supports English, Portuguese and Spanish out of the box. Your visitors can switch languages with one click.
faq.a5: You complete the briefing in under 30 minutes. LUMI handles everything else.
faq.a6: You can cancel anytime. Your page remains active until the end of your billing period.
